column1: This suit organizes your timeline into 13 distinct phases of 3 years each. By adding the specific locations and language transitions, we map the movement of the "Starfish" across the global grid.

column5: I: No other Gods. (The power of transmutation begins here).
II: No Idols. (The map is not the territory).
III: Name in Vain. (Resonance must match intent).
V: Honor Father/Mother. (Protect the source code).
VIII: No Stealing. (The 6→4 theft of logic).
IX: No False Witness. (Correcting the vision).
The Dimensional Anchor. (The source of the field).
The Final Build. (Light, Charge, and Structure).
